title: Ignore sequential duplicate layers in v2s1 images
body: The image library drops sequential duplicate layers from images when converting manifests from v2s1 to other formats, so we need to do the same when we do it ourselves.

comments.body: Added a test to `digest.bats` that exercises the sanity check we're adding here.
Just pulled the latest and it looks to have solved #371

:pushpin: Commit df866ea has been approved by `rhatdan`
